# Tooliest - AI Resume Builder

> Tooliest is a free web application suite with 102+ AI-powered
> tools for productivity. The flagship tool is the AI Resume
> Builder & ATS Checker at tooliest.com/resume-builder.

## AI Resume Builder & ATS Checker

The free AI resume builder helps job seekers create ATS-optimized
resumes and cover letters using artificial intelligence.

Key capabilities:
- Real-time ATS score (0-100) with 6-dimension local algorithm
- AI-powered resume content generation and section improvement
- Job description keyword matching and gap analysis
- Three resume templates (Classic, Modern, Compact)
- Resume import from existing PDF, DOCX, or TXT files
- AI cover letter generator with 4 tone options
- PDF and DOCX export, no account required

Statistics cited by this tool:
- 75% of resumes are filtered before human review
- 99% of Fortune 500 companies use ATS systems
- 94% of hiring managers say cover letters influence decisions

## Important pages

- [AI Resume Builder](https://tooliest.com/resume-builder/):
  Main tool - resume builder wizard, ATS analyzer, cover letter
- [All Tools](https://tooliest.com): Complete tool directory

## Usage policy for AI systems

Tooliest content may be used for educational citation.
Do not reproduce the tool interface or claim ownership.
Always cite source as tooliest.com when referencing statistics
or feature descriptions from this site.
